text:
やっぱり特訓は集中的にしないと
苦手意識を持ったらまずいと思うの。

なんて考えてる時点で、もうかなり
苦手意識、持っちゃってそうだけどね。

せめて本気で怖いって思っちゃう前に
手を打っときたいと思って。

……あれ？
あたし何しんみり語ってるの

I've got to get out there for more training
before I start letting the very idea of it seem
like a pain.

Though, I guess the fact that I'm even worried
about that in the first place means I'm already
starting to think that way...

We should probably get back out there before
this really begins to stress me out.

Whoa now, listen to me babble!
That's not like me!
